criteria.name: feedback timing has no leakage violations
candidate reaches minimum accuracy on capacity-interference tasks
candidate improves over v1.4 raw CRA
internal candidate approaches external scaffold

result.failure_reason: Failed criteria: candidate reaches minimum accuracy on capacity-interference tasks, candidate improves over v1.4 raw CRA, memory ablations are worse than candidate, candidate beats sign persistence, candidate is competitive with best standard baseline
result.name: memory_capacity_interference_stressor

tier_summary.claim_boundary: Software stress diagnostic only: internal host-side context binding under capacity/interference pressure, not native on-chip memory, sleep/replay, or hardware evidence.
